hero.subtitle: Exclusive Fine Jewelry & Certified Diamonds
hero.title: Fine jewelry, made to a standard you can verify.
hero.description: AURELIA designs and casts 18k gold and certified diamond jewelry — one bespoke piece for a private client, or a full production run for a retail partner. Every stone traceable, every setting inspected.

pillars.title: One Piece or Ten Thousand
pillars.description: The same casting floor and quality checks serve a single custom order and a full wholesale production run — no compromise either way.

pillars.title: CAD to Casting
pillars.description: Send a sketch or a reference photo. Our team builds a precision 3D model and a resin prototype before anything touches metal.

pillars.title: Verified Sourcing
pillars.description: RJC-certified metal and Kimberley Process diamonds, with paperwork that travels with every piece we ship.

craftsmanship.subtitle: Inside the Workshop
craftsmanship.title: Casting and prototyping, done in-house
craftsmanship.description1: AURELIA combines 3D resin prototyping, precise CAD modeling, and vacuum induction casting with hand-finishing by master setters. Every setting is checked for accuracy to within 10 microns.
craftsmanship.description2: We use only RJC-certified metal and Kimberley Process diamonds — a supply chain our clients can trace, whether they're buying one ring or one thousand.

hero.subtitle: The People Behind the Pieces
hero.title: Every piece starts with someone who checks their work twice.

philosophy.subtitle: Scale & Precision
philosophy.title: From a single casting bench to a global workshop
philosophy.description1: AURELIA began as a small casting workshop and has grown into a full manufacturing atelier. We handle 3D CAD modeling, custom casting, and hand-setting under one roof — with the capacity to produce 50,000+ pieces a month for retail chains, wholesalers, and importers, and the patience to build a single custom commission the same way.
philosophy.description2: Every stone we set is certified conflict-free, and every shipment carries the paperwork to prove it.
philosophy.feature1Desc: We source only conflict-free metals and diamonds, audited for compliance.
philosophy.feature2Desc: Work with our engineers to create custom 3D CAD models and custom casting molds.

milestones.title: Factory Inception
milestones.description: Our founder establishes our first specialized casting foundry in Paris, supplying structural findings and mountings for local retailers.

milestones.title: CAD/CAM Engineering
milestones.description: We introduce computer-aided design modeling and computer-aided manufacturing, offering custom cast designs at high speed.

milestones.title: RJC Sourcing Compliance
milestones.description: AURELIA joins the Responsible Jewellery Council. From this point, 100% of our gold and diamonds are ethically sourced and documented.

milestones.title: Global Sourcing & Exports
milestones.description: We open direct-to-buyer ordering alongside our wholesale program, shipping custom and catalogue jewelry to individual clients and 500+ global retail partners.

info.address: 259, Silverstone Arcade, Singanpor gam, Singanpor, Surat, Gujarat 395004
